summary: Tested Touchpoint/Activity Tracking Bug Fixes - All 14 backend tests passed. Verified SMS, Email, and Personal SMS channels now create contact_events correctly. Fixed minor inconsistencies in engagement_signals.py and leaderboard_v2.py to include email_failed in counts.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: messages.py correctly creates contact_events for Twilio SMS (sms_sent/sms_failed) at lines 411-430 and 1135-1154
VERIFIED: messages.py correctly creates contact_events for personal SMS (personal_sms) at lines 378-390 and 1104-1113
VERIFIED: messages.py correctly creates contact_events for email (email_sent/email_failed) at lines 344-358 and 1069-1082
VERIFIED: tasks.py summary counts personal_sms, sms_personal, sms_sent, sms_failed for texts (line 211)
VERIFIED: tasks.py summary counts email_sent AND email_failed for emails (line 212)
VERIFIED: tasks.py cards_sent excludes _viewed events, only counts _card_sent and card_shared (line 189)
VERIFIED: leaderboard_v2.py CATEGORIES includes sms_failed in sms events (line 27)
FIXED: Added email_failed to leaderboard_v2.py CATEGORIES emails events (line 26)
FIXED: Added email_failed to engagement_signals.py team_stats emails count (line 390)
seed_data_creation: Test contact created and cleaned up via fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All touchpoint tracking bug fixes verified working. The key event_types for counting are: personal_sms (from resolve_event_type), sms_sent/sms_failed (Twilio), email_sent/email_failed (Resend), congrats_card_sent (explicit), call_placed. The summary endpoint at /api/tasks/{user_id}/summary now correctly totals all activity types. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_touchpoint_tracking_bugfixes.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with c: Creates contact_event with event_type=sms_sent or sms_failed
Creates contact_event with event_type=email_sent or email_failed
features_tested.GET /api/tasks/{user_id}/summary activit: Only counts _card_sent and card_shared, NOT _viewed events
features_tested.GET /api/tasks/{user_id}/performance: Same consistent counting logic as summary

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends may fail but contact_events are still created
mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCKED - Email sends fail in preview (domain not verified) but email_failed events are created

bug_fixes_applied_during_testing.fix: Added email_failed to emails count in team_stats for consistency with tasks.py
Added email_failed to CATEGORIES emails events for consistency with tasks.py
